mentions.note: Real company with solid revenues ($160M+ expected FY), improving financials, strong AI growth (76% customer YoY, 72% large-customer ARR YoY). 3x sales, 50x forward earnings. But hardware costs up 30% YoY, legacy backup declining, and everyone selling AI stocks for SpaceX capital. Put a pin in it; revisit post-SpaceX deal close.

Cloud storage/data mobility play for AI workloads. Real revenue ($160M+ forecast), improving profitability, strong AI customer growth (+76% YoY), NeoCloud TAM ($14B). Risks: AWS/Google/Microsoft competition, rising hardware costs (+30% YoY), legacy backup business declining. Valuation 3x sales, 50x forward earnings—not cheap. Timing terrible amid SpaceX/Anthropic/OpenAI capital drain. Put a pin in it; revisit after mega-IPO cycle.

Cloud storage alternative to S3 with strong AI tailwinds (76% AI customer growth, $14B opportunity by 2030). Solid financials improving toward profitability. However, hardware costs up 30% YoY, legacy backup declining, and timing poor with speculators selling AI stocks for IPO allocations. Real company, wrong environment.
